key_event.1890-1899: Sino-Japanese War defeat and Scramble for Concessions
key_event.1900-1909: Boxer defeat, exam abolition, Tongmenghui, provincial assemblies
key_event.1910-1919: Xinhai Revolution, warlord fragmentation, May Fourth mobilization
key_event.1920-1929: Northern Expedition reunification and Nanjing government; 1927 anti-labor purge
key_event.1930-1939: Nanjing Decade state-building, then Japanese invasion (1937)
key_event.1940-1949: CCP victory in civil war; founding of PRC (1949)
key_event.1950-1959: CCP consolidation: collectivization, purges, danwei/hukou, Great Leap
key_event.1960-1969: Cultural Revolution and deepening danwei/hukou atomization of society
key_event.1970-1979: Mao's death, Gang of Four fall, Reform and Opening begin
key_event.1980-1989: Reform-era economic opening, then Tiananmen crackdown
key_event.1990-1999: Post-Tiananmen repression plus fiscal recentralization and growth-based legitimacy
key_event.2000-2009: WTO-driven boom and Olympics-era security consolidation
key_event.2010-2019: Xi's consolidation, digital surveillance state, 709 crackdown
